page_metadata.biotools__summary: A set of six survival analysis models to model high dimensional right-censored survival data by combining kernel ELMs with the Buckley–James estimator, regularized Cox model, random forests and boosting.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A set of six survival analysis models to model high dimensional right-censored survival data by combining kernel ELMs with the Buckley–James estimator, regularized Cox model, random forests and boosting.
